infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: AmyNest needs access to your photos so you can set a profile picture for your child.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: AmyNest needs access to your camera so you can take a profile picture for your child.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: AmyNest uses the microphone for voice features in Amy AI Coach (optional).
infoPlist.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: We don't track you across other apps. This is only used if you explicitly enable referral attribution.

plugins.photosPermission: AmyNest needs access to your photos so you can set a profile picture for your child.
plugins.cameraPermission: AmyNest needs access to your camera so you can take a profile picture for your child.
